summary: All four requirements (REQ-21 through REQ-24) appear to be implemented. The new ConsultationTypePage.tsx covers the three consultation type cards with selection logic, fee breakdown with travel fee and sequential discount logic, and the Continue button. App.tsx registers the new route. PublicDoctorProfilePage.tsx is updated. One minor theme consistency concern exists.

missing_requirements.requirement: Styling must follow the existing Medical Blue theme consistently throughout all cards.
missing_requirements.reason: The ConsultationTypePage.tsx uses distinct color schemes per card (blue for Online, emerald for Clinic Visit, purple for Home Visit) rather than a unified Medical Blue theme. The AC explicitly states 'The screen follows the Medical Blue theme consistently.'
